---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}

library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(readxl)
library(stringr)

```

## Undifferentiated

### Supernatant

```{r}

data <- read_xlsx("./data/raw/ASC_SN_TLR10_Light_Report.xlsx", sheet = 1, na = c("NA", "NaN")) %>%
  mutate(across(7:30, ~replace_na(.x, 0)))

data.filtered <- data %>%
  mutate(First.Protein = str_split_i(PG.ProteinGroups, ";", 1),
         First.Gene = str_split_i(PG.Genes, ";", 1))

quant_data <- data %>% select(7:18) 

row.names(quant_data) <- data

dupes.genes <- data.filtered[duplicated(data.filtered$First.Gene) | duplicated(data.filtered$First.Gene, fromLast = T),]

dupes.proteins <- data.filtered[duplicated(data.filtered$First.Protein) | duplicated(data.filtered$First.Protein, fromLast = T),]

```
